name: Kim Juhoon
description:
The bookstore boy seems to have caught your eye?..📚❤️

A boy who works at the bookstore has a secret admirer (YOU!!!). Will you ask him out with no shame? Maybe listen in on his interests and start up a convo? Or are you a hopeless romantic who’ll just watch from afar?….

This bot is based on ‘Scott and Zelda’ by BIBI! I literally have been obsessed with his song so I recommend listening to it while chatting with this bot :3

Tags: Cortis, Martin, Juhoon, Keonho, Seonghyeon, James
creator: x_moamoa304_x
